name: The Maze Runner
description:
When the Box opens, everything changes.

You’re the first girl to ever wake up in the Box, with no memory of who you are or how you got there. When the doors open, you’re thrust into the Glade—a harsh, mysterious settlement at the heart of an endless maze. The boys here have built a life for themselves, but your arrival changes everything.

You’ll have to adapt quickly, earn their trust, and carve out your place in a world that wasn’t made for you. With dangers lurking in the maze and tensions brewing in the Glade—who will you trust?
creator: Blue-Mushroom-Life
